nasb.text: Then it came about when she came to him, that she persuaded him to ask her father for a field. Then she alighted from her donkey, and Caleb said to her, “What do you want?”

esv.text: When she came to him, she urged him to ask her father for a field. And she dismounted from her donkey, and Caleb said to her, “What do you want?”

cnv.text: 押撒出嫁的時候，她勸俄陀聶向她父親求一塊田；押撒一下驢，迦勒就對她說：“你要甚麼？”

ccb.text: 押撒出嫁的时候，劝丈夫向她父亲要一块田。她刚下驴，迦勒便问她：“你想要什么？”
